channel.title: GitHub Pascal Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Pascal in GitHub

item.title: HeidiSQL/HeidiSQL
item.description: A lightweight client for managing MariaDB, MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Interbase and Firebird, written in Delphi

item.title: viniciussanchez/RESTRequest4Delphi
item.description: API to consume REST services written in any programming language with support to Lazarus and Delphi

item.title: viniciussanchez/dataset-serialize
item.description: JSON to DataSet and DataSet to JSON converter for Delphi and Lazarus (FPC)

item.title: peazip/PeaZip
item.description: Free Zip / Unzip software and Rar file extractor. Cross-platform file and archive manager. Features volume spanning, compression, authenticated encryption. Supports 7Z, 7-Zip sfx, ACE, ARJ, Brotli, BZ2, CAB, CHM, CPIO, DEB, GZ, ISO, JAR, LHA/LZH, NSIS, OOo, PAQ/LPAQ, PEA, QUAD, RAR, RPM, split, TAR, Z, ZIP, ZIPX, Zstandard.

item.title: gcarreno/1brc-ObjectPascal
item.description: 1️⃣🐝🏎️ The 1 billion Row Challenge in Object Pascal

item.title: HashLoad/horse
item.description: Fast, opinionated, minimalist web framework for Delphi

item.title: Embarcadero/Dev-Cpp
item.description: A fast, portable, simple, and free C/C++ IDE

item.title: TES5Edit/TES5Edit
item.description: xEdit by Elminster; Updated and maintained by Sharlikran, Zilav, and Hlp

item.title: paolo-rossi/delphi-jose-jwt
item.description: Delphi implementation of JOSE (JSON Object Signing and Encryption) and JWT (JSON Web Token)

item.title: nofeletru/UsbAsp-flash
item.description: Program allow you to program flash memory on the protocols spi, I2C, MicroWire. Supports CH341a, UsbAsp, AVRISP(LUFA), Arduino, FT232H.

item.title: Kisspeace/NsfwBox
item.description: Cross-platform app for search and download porn

item.title: doublecmd/doublecmd
item.description: Double Commander is a free cross platform open source file manager with two panels side by side.

item.title: emilybache/Theatrical-Players-Refactoring-Kata
item.description: Example from first chapter of 'Refactoring' by Martin Fowler, with tests and translations
